title: Enchanted Warfare
description: This mods makes minecrafts fighting system better
body:
![Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/867d4ad990308677f2e6b231b0fb1d0cf33cd0bd.png)

# This mod improves minecraft combat in its entirety

## Review

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/oGN5IY8xxaU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Changes

### 1. Every attack has 3 stages

  Preperation, Damage, Recovery Period

  ![Swing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8973413c2d662ffec0fe6909b9db7f0b895fd45d.gif)

### 2. Weapon combos

Every weapon has a unique sequence of different attacks

### 3. Accurate attack collision detection.

A unique collision box is assigned to every attack in the mod

### 4. Added strong attacks. 

![Strong attack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/yvWa4YM6/images/aa5ee20f4802cce0bd1440aa777d56d1881f3c02_350.webp)

Executed by sprint attacking while being on the ground. Multiplies the damage by 1.5

### 5. Added jumping attacks

![Jumping Attack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/yvWa4YM6/images/8bb052523d94074caa40fbf5db1f3d6841b789e8_350.webp)
   
Executed by sprint attacking while not being on the ground. If the attack uses legs will deal 3 damage. Removes air friction while being in the air allowing free movement.

### 6. Added leaping attacks

![Leaping Attack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/yvWa4YM6/images/c71912dfb413e0b4870471e672de5a682c593509_350.webp)

Executed by sprint attacking while being on the ground and then jumping. You will jump very high and transition into a jumping attack.

### 7. Air strikes

![Airstrike](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/yvWa4YM6/images/fba5fcd739ca0aa8062b1781abe5fde3b97e0ce8_350.webp)

Executed by looking down while being 5+ blocks above the ground. Multiplues the damage based on your velocity.

### 8. Projectile parrying system

Hit any projectile to parry it.

### 9. Omnidirectional knockback.

Knockback will now push targets away from you in a straight line, instead of pushing them away from your cursor.
